description: Bump all platform packages and plugins from 0.0.79 to 0.0.80, publish all packages (platform + plugins) to npm, and rebuild plugins with updated lock files.
qualityChecks: npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run test

userStories.title: Bump version from 0.0.79 to 0.0.80 and publish to npm
userStories.description: Load the bump-version skill and execute every step: bump all version references, build, publish all 7 platform packages to npm in dependency order, rebuild all plugins, publish all plugins to npm, and commit everything.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 platform package.json files have version 0.0.80
All plugin package.json files have version 0.0.80 with SDK/tools dep ranges ^0.0.80
All 7 platform packages are published to npm at 0.0.80 (verify with npm view)
All plugins are published to npm at 0.0.80 (verify a sample with npm view)
All plugin package-lock.json files reference the published 0.0.80 versions
No hardcoded 0.0.79 version strings remain in platform/ TypeScript source
userStories.notes:
Use the `skill` tool to load the `bump-version` skill, then follow every step in the 'Reference: What the Worker Does' section exactly.

The skill is at `.claude/skills/bump-version/__SKILL__.md` — read it first.

Key steps in order:
1. Update version in all 7 platform package.json files: shared, plugin-sdk, browser-extension, mcp-server, plugin-tools, cli, create-plugin
2. Update version in platform/browser-extension/manifest.json
3. Update version AND dependency ranges in all plugin package.json files (plugins/*/package.json)
4. Run `npm install --package-lock-only` at repo root to update root lock file
5. Scan for hardcoded '0.0.79' strings in platform/**/*.ts
6. Run `npm run build` and `npm run type-check`
7. Commit the version bump (message: 'bump version to 0.0.80')
8. Verify npm auth: `npm whoami` must return 'opentabs-dev-admin'
9. Publish platform packages in this exact order:
   - cd platform/shared && npm publish
   - cd platform/browser-extension && npm publish
   - cd platform/mcp-server && npm publish
   - cd platform/plugin-sdk && npm publish
   - cd platform/plugin-tools && npm publish
   - cd platform/cli && npm publish
   - cd platform/create-plugin && npm publish
10. After all 7 are published, verify: `npm view @opentabs-dev/shared@0.0.80 version`
11. Run `npm run build:plugins` to install published versions and rebuild all plugins
12. Publish ALL plugins: for each directory in plugins/*, run `cd plugins/<name> && npm publish`
13. Verify a sample plugin: `npm view @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-slack@0.0.80 version`
14. Commit plugin lock file updates (message: 'update plugin lock files for 0.0.80')

Constraints:
- Do NOT change any publishConfig.access values — all packages are public
- Do NOT bump the docs/ version — it is independent
- Do NOT modify the root package.json — it has no version field
- Do NOT change any code logic — this is a version-only change
- Plugin packages use `^0.0.80` semver ranges, NOT exact versions
- If npm publish fails with ETARGET during plugin install, wait 10s and retry (registry propagation delay)
- Publish order matters: shared first, then browser-extension, mcp-server, plugin-sdk, plugin-tools, cli, create-plugin
- Push AFTER publishing — the pre-push hook runs build:plugins which needs packages on npm
